message:
Resolve auto-flush and auto-import flags from merged config layers

Previously the no_auto_flush and no_auto_import flags were resolved
solely from CLI arguments. This change introduces config-file-aware
resolution via new helper functions no_auto_flush_from_layer() and
no_auto_import_from_layer() in the config module, supporting both
direct keys (no-auto-flush, no_auto_flush) and inverted keys
(sync.auto_flush = false implies no-auto-flush = true).

The main.rs auto-import and auto-flush paths now read merged config
(CLI + config file layers) instead of raw CLI booleans, so users
can disable auto-sync behavior via .beads/config.toml without
passing flags on every invocation. CLI overrides now only emit
Some(true) when the flag is explicitly set, preventing false CLI
values from overriding config file settings.

- src/config/mod.rs: +31 lines — no_auto_flush_from_layer() and
  no_auto_import_from_layer() with direct + inverted key support
- src/main.rs: run_auto_import() drops no_auto_import param, resolves
  from merged config internally; run_auto_flush() checks merged
  config for disabled state; build_cli_overrides() emits None
  instead of Some(false) for unset flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
